description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, dark wooden body with metallic accents and vibrant green highlights, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The barrel is elongated and appears to have a vented or ribbed design with green inlays running along its length. The cylinder section is also highlighted in green, suggesting a unique loading mechanism, possibly a revolving chamber. The grip is ergonomically shaped with a pronounced curve, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger. The overall construction appears robust, with a blend of wood and metal materials, and the green elements add a futuristic or sci-fi touch. The shotgun's design is both functional and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A dark wood and metal shotgun with green highlights, featuring a long vented barrel and a curved ergonomic grip. The design blends classic and futuristic elements with a prominent revolving chamber.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the green-vented barrel, and the curved grip.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular green chamber and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the green chamber and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the green chamber, with the barrel receding into the distance.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and green inlays
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
